/tmp/codeql-scratch-3b63ee943670348a/dbs/cpp/working/autobuild/bin/c++ -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/ggml.dir/link.d -shared -Wl,-soname,libggml.so.0 -o ../../../bin/libggml.so.0.9.7 "CMakeFiles/ggml.dir/ggml-backend-dl.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/ggml.dir/ggml-backend-reg.cpp.o"  -Wl,-rpath,/home/runner/work/Mr.ToM/Mr.ToM/_codeql_build_dir/bin: -ldl ../../../bin/libggml-cpu.so.0.9.7 ../../../bin/libggml-base.so.0.9.7
